name: @memberjunction/external-data-source-snowflake
description: Snowflake driver for the MemberJunction External Data Sources primitive. Registers a BaseExternalDataSourceDriver implementation via @RegisterClass(BaseExternalDataSourceDriver, 'SnowflakeExternalDriver') using the official snowflake-sdk for live, read-only proxied access to a Snowflake account.
author: MemberJunction.com
